landing.title:
Structure your AI investment decisions —
continue, revise, or scale — into what to decide next.
landing.subtitle: We turn your ambiguous situation into a structured prompt — with owner, deadline, and priority criteria visible.
landing.problem1: Not a diagnostic. Not a summary. A structure that moves you to the next decision.
landing.limitation: 2 requests per day | Up to 3 issues analyzed

demo.title: Question-to-Decision Demo
demo.subtitle: Transform entangled executive tensions into askable questions
demo.inputLabel: Enter your business concerns or tensions
demo.inputPlaceholder: Example: After AI adoption, decision speed has slowed down, but we can't measure outcomes. AI talent recruitment isn't progressing either.
demo.processingMessage: AI is analyzing the issues (may take 1-2 minutes)
demo.notAskableTitle: Why this can't be asked yet
demo.notAskableContact: For more detailed diagnosis, please contact us.

blocked.title: Access Blocked
blocked.rateLimitMessage: Daily usage limit reached. Please try again in 24 hours.
blocked.contactNote: If you need assistance, please contact us.

errors.rateLimitExceeded: Daily usage limit reached. Please try again in 24 hours.
errors.inputError: There is an issue with your input
errors.serverError: Diagnosis failed. Please try again later.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

q2d.q1Label: Describe the situation where your decision is currently stalled
q2d.q1Placeholder: Example: 6 months after AI adoption, expected cost savings are unmet but operational efficiency has improved. We can't decide whether to continue or revise, additional investment is on hold, and it's unclear who makes the final call.
q2d.q2Label: What do you most want to clarify in this decision?
q2d.q2OtherPlaceholder: Briefly describe what you want to clarify
q2d.q2Option_opt1: Clarify criteria for continue or stop decision
q2d.q2Option_opt3: Clarify final decision-maker and accountability scope
q2d.q2Option_opt4: Clarify criteria for additional investment or expansion
q2d.q2Option_preBasis: Define criteria for the adoption decision
q2d.q2Option_preFull: Determine whether to proceed with full adoption
q2d.processingMessage: AI is analyzing the issues (may take 1-2 minutes)
q2d.additionalIntro: Some decision conditions are unclear. Please answer what you can (skippable).
q2d.ownerQuestion: Who is the final decision-maker for this decision?
q2d.ownerPlaceholder: e.g., CEO, CFO, Board of Directors
q2d.timeQuestion: When does this decision need to be made?
q2d.timePlaceholder: e.g., End of this month, Next month, By year-end
q2d.ruleQuestion: What is the top priority criterion for this decision?
q2d.rulePlaceholder: e.g., ROI, Risk reduction, Execution speed
q2d.completeDescription: We have structured the decision owner, deadline, and priority criteria. Next, we will generate a prompt you can use for the decision.
q2d.typeSelectIntro: Select the option that best describes your current decision challenge
q2d.typeLabel_continuation: Can't decide whether to continue or stop
q2d.typeDescription_continuation: Can't decide whether to continue, revise, or stop this AI investment
q2d.typeLabel_roi_interpretation: ROI or success criteria are unclear
q2d.typeDescription_roi_interpretation: Expected outcomes and actual evaluation criteria don't align
q2d.typeLabel_expansion: Can't move forward on expansion or additional investment
q2d.typeDescription_expansion: Can't decide whether to scale up or make additional investment in AI
q2d.typeLabel_responsibility_structure: Ownership and authority structure is unclear
q2d.typeDescription_responsibility_structure: Unclear who should decide and who is accountable
q2d.typeLabel_pre_adoption: Can't move forward on adoption decision
q2d.typeDescription_pre_adoption: Can't decide whether to start AI investment or how far to proceed
q2d.typeDescription_other: Not sure where to begin structuring the decision
q2d.mandatoryIntro: Please enter the basic information needed for this decision
q2d.mandatoryOwnerPlaceholder: e.g., CEO, CFO, Board of Directors
q2d.mandatoryTimeHorizonLabel: When does this decision need to be made?
q2d.mandatoryTimeHorizonCustomPlaceholder: e.g., Next board meeting, First week of Q3
q2d.mandatoryBudgetSourceLabel: Which budget or investment scope does this involve?
q2d.mandatoryBudgetSourcePlaceholder: e.g., IT budget, R&D investment, Corporate strategy budget
q2d.mandatoryDecisionRuleLabel: What is the top priority criterion for this decision?
q2d.mandatoryDecisionRulePlaceholder: e.g., ROI, Risk reduction, Execution speed
q2d.typeQ_continuation_q1: Describe the situation where your decision is currently stalled
q2d.typeQ_continuation_q2: What do you most want to clarify in this decision?
q2d.typeQ_continuation_additional: Has a criteria for continue/stop been defined?
q2d.typeQ_roi_q1: Describe the situation where your decision is currently stalled
q2d.typeQ_roi_q2: What do you most want to clarify in this decision?
q2d.typeQ_roi_additional: Is this a short-term shortfall or a structural problem?
q2d.typeQ_responsibility_q1: Describe the situation where your decision is currently stalled
q2d.typeQ_responsibility_q2: What do you most want to clarify in this decision?
q2d.typeQ_responsibility_additional: Who has the authority to declare a stop?
q2d.typeQ_pre_adoption_q2: What would you most like to clarify first for this adoption decision?
q2d.typeQ_generic_q1: Describe the situation where your decision is currently stalled
q2d.typeQ_generic_q2: What do you most want to clarify in this decision?
q2d.typeQ_generic_additional: What is the scope of what needs to be decided this time?
q2d.decisionUnit_continuation: We are deciding whether to continue, scale down, or stop this AI investment.
q2d.decisionUnit_roi_interpretation: We are deciding whether to treat this AI investment's ROI shortfall as a temporary miss or a structural problem.
q2d.decisionUnit_responsibility_structure: We are deciding, after fixing the accountability structure, whether to proceed with full-scale deployment, limited operation, or temporary suspension of this AI adoption.
q2d.decisionUnit_expansion: We are deciding whether to expand this AI investment, make additional investment, or maintain the current scope.
q2d.decisionUnit_pre_adoption: We are deciding whether to start this AI investment and to what extent or scope to proceed.
q2d.decisionUnit_other: We are deciding how to classify the currently blocked decision in this AI investment.
q2d.outOfScope_continuation: We are not deciding the detailed execution plan for this AI investment.
q2d.outOfScope_roi_interpretation: We are not deciding the optimization of individual initiatives.
q2d.outOfScope_responsibility_structure: We are not deciding the full replacement of AI tools, detailed feature improvements, or the final budget allocation breakdown.
q2d.outOfScope_expansion: We are not deciding the detailed execution plan or budget design for expansion or additional investment.
q2d.outOfScope_pre_adoption: We are not deciding the detailed operational design or outcome metrics after adoption.
q2d.outOfScope_other: We are not deciding all related issues at once.
q2d.nextInfo_continuation: Next, we need to clarify the criteria for continue/stop and document currently observable outcomes.
q2d.nextInfo_roi_interpretation: Next, we need to clarify the metrics used to judge ROI shortfall and the comparison benchmarks.
q2d.nextInfo_responsibility_structure: Unfixed accountability roles must be confirmed: nominate the final owner / clarify the stop authority / designate the operational owner / agree on the approval / use / oversight role separation plan.
q2d.nextInfo_expansion: Next, we need an impact estimate for expansion or additional investment, and clear outcome metrics as decision criteria.
q2d.nextInfo_pre_adoption: Next, we need to clarify the adoption objective, scope, and decision criteria, and verify the necessary structure and budget.
q2d.nextInfo_other: Next, we need additional information to narrow the blocked decision down to one.
q2d.reviewCondition_continuation: Re-judgment is possible when: observable evidence for continuation (confirmed outcomes) or for stopping (no improvement signal) becomes available.
q2d.reviewCondition_continuation_with: By {timeHorizon}: confirm observable conditions for each option (continue / scale down / stop) and re-judge.
q2d.reviewCondition_roi_interpretation: Re-judgment is possible when: a comparison benchmark and period data to distinguish temporary vs. structural ROI shortfall are available.
q2d.reviewCondition_roi_interpretation_with: By {timeHorizon}: determine whether the ROI shortfall is temporary or structural, then re-judge the budget allocation.
q2d.reviewCondition_responsibility_structure: Re-judgment is possible when: all three roles (final owner, stop authority, operational owner) are nominated AND agreement on the approval / use / oversight role separation is reached.
By {timeHorizon}: complete the nomination of all three roles (final owner, stop authority, operational owner) and approve the role separation plan, then re-judge.
q2d.reviewCondition_expansion: Re-judgment is possible when: impact estimate for expansion investment and outcome metrics are defined.
q2d.reviewCondition_expansion_with: By {timeHorizon}: verify the impact estimate and outcome metrics for expansion or additional investment and re-judge.
q2d.reviewCondition_pre_adoption: Re-judgment is possible when: adoption objective, success criteria, required structure, and budget estimate are aligned.
q2d.reviewCondition_pre_adoption_with: By {timeHorizon}: verify adoption objective, structure, and budget, then make the adoption decision.
q2d.reviewCondition_other: Re-judgment is possible when: additional information to narrow the blocked decision down to one is obtained.
q2d.reviewCondition_other_with: By {timeHorizon}: narrow the blocked decision down to one and re-judge.
q2d.sectionOutOfScope: What we are not deciding this time
q2d.csReviewWhatNeeded: What must be in place for re-judgment
q2d.dcCopied: Decision Compression prompt copied to clipboard.
q2d.dcErrorTitle: An error occurred in the next step
q2d.dcErrorMessage: The decision structure has been organized. Please try again with the retry button.
